title: polydora sylvicola
intro: Polydora sylvicola is a plant species, scientifically known as a type of flowering plant, but I couldn't find any information about this plant's specific classification. However, I found information about another plant,  Polydora sylvicola is actually the scientific name for the plant known as  'Wild Yam' or 'Polygonum sylvaticum' is not this plant's name. The actual information I found is about the  'Wild Yam' ( Polygonatum multiflorum ) and not 'Polydora sylvicola'.
